"[12] [Notification] [CHP]-1021 TO THE INV PRTY ------- RP STATES SEVERAL TIMES HE DOESNT KNOW WHAT TO DO, HE DOESNT KNOW IF HE CAN AFFORD A TOW HE DOESNT KNOW IF HIS INSURANCE WILL SEND A TOW , HE HASNT CHECKED TO SEE IF HIS HITCH IS DAMAGED AND HE DOESNT KNOWWHAT THE CONDITION OF THE VEH IS OR IF HE WILL NEED A TOW "
